flashcards.definition: P(t) = (V₀I₀/2)[cosφ − cos(2ωt+φ)]; constant part = average power.
P_avg = V₀I₀ cosφ / 2; the oscillating term averages to zero.
Carrier × signal uses product-to-sum to produce sum and difference frequencies.
Decomposing signals into sine and cosine components using these identities.
